feature: Agent Control Plane Web UI Dashboard
success_criteria: Dashboard shows real-time fleet status summary (total, online, offline, degraded counts)
Dashboard page lists all agents with name, provider, status, last-seen, and response time
Health history view shows timeline of health checks for each agent with status changes
Cost view displays monthly cost breakdown per agent with totals
Export button on UI triggers JSON download of current inventory
Auto-refresh dashboard every 30 seconds or manual refresh button
FastAPI server starts with single command and serves dashboard on localhost
Responsive layout works on desktop and tablet browsers
At least 70% test coverage on backend API routes
README updated with dashboard setup and usage instructions

history.note: Proposed by generator: Agent Control Plane Web UI Dashboard
